scripts.test:server:regression: npm --prefix server test -- --runTestsByPath tests/authMiddleware.test.js tests/profileSecurity.test.js tests/otpSystem.test.js tests/otpEmailFailClosed.test.js tests/paymentOrderIntegrity.test.js tests/userPhoneIndex.test.js tests/orderControllerCreate.test.js tests/communicationUtilities.test.js tests/communicationServices.test.js tests/adminUserControllerResilience.test.js tests/adminUserRoutes.integration.test.js tests/paymentSecurityGuards.test.js tests/adminProductRoutes.integration.test.js tests/paymentRefundState.test.js tests/adminPaymentRoutes.integration.test.js tests/adminAnalyticsRoutes.integration.test.js tests/adminNotificationRoutes.integration.test.js tests/aiRoutes.test.js tests/healthRoutes.test.js tests/healthReadinessService.test.js tests/adminFraudRoutes.test.js tests/fraudDecisioningService.test.js tests/marketplaceIntegrityService.test.js tests/orderPlacementService.test.js tests/commerceAssistantService.test.js tests/geminiGatewayService.test.js tests/modelGatewayService.test.js tests/ollamaGatewayService.test.js tests/runtimeConfig.test.js --forceExit
scripts.build: cd app && npm install && npm run build
scripts.student-pack:god: npm run student-pack:doctor && npm run student-pack:start
scripts.security:login-next10: node scripts/validate-login-architecture-next10.mjs && node scripts/validate-login-live-readiness.mjs && npm --prefix server test -- --runTestsByPath tests/authRiskEngineService.test.js tests/authRiskSignalService.test.js tests/authRiskSignalProducerMiddleware.test.js tests/authSecurityEventOutboxService.test.js tests/loginArchitecturePolicy.test.js tests/loginRuntimeEnforcementPolicy.test.js
scripts.desktop:dist:win: npm run desktop:frontend:build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64
scripts.desktop:dist:win:all: npm run desktop:frontend:build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64 --ia32 --arm64
scripts.desktop:dist:mac: npm run desktop:frontend:build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --x64 --arm64
scripts.desktop:dist:linux: npm run desktop:frontend:build && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb rpm tar.gz --x64 --arm64
scripts.security:audit: npm run security:audit:root && npm run security:audit:app && npm run security:audit:server
scripts.security:auth-tests: npm --prefix server test -- --runTestsByPath tests/authRoutes.integration.test.js tests/otpRoutes.test.js tests/authMiddleware.cookie.test.js tests/browserSessionService.test.js tests/trustedDeviceChallengeService.test.js tests/authSessionService.test.js tests/csrfMiddleware.test.js tests/distributedRateLimit.test.js tests/authRecoveryCodeService.test.js tests/authMiddleware.admin.test.js tests/authSecurityTelemetryService.test.js tests/metricsAuth.test.js
scripts.security:auth: npm --prefix server test -- --runTestsByPath tests/authRoutes.integration.test.js tests/loginAttackSmoke.test.js tests/authMiddleware.test.js tests/authMiddleware.cookie.test.js tests/authSessionService.test.js --forceExit
scripts.security:access-control: npm run security:idor && npm run security:admin
scripts.security:tokens: npm --prefix server test -- --runTestsByPath tests/auth.tokens.security.test.js tests/authMiddleware.test.js tests/authMiddleware.cookie.test.js tests/authSessionService.test.js --forceExit
scripts.security:otp-reset: npm --prefix server test -- --runTestsByPath tests/otpRoutes.test.js tests/otpSystem.test.js tests/otpStorageSafety.test.js tests/authRecoveryCodeService.test.js --forceExit
scripts.security:cors-csrf: npm --prefix server test -- --runTestsByPath tests/config.cors-csrf.security.test.js tests/corsMiddleware.test.js tests/csrfMiddleware.test.js tests/csrfAuthRoutes.integration.test.js --forceExit
scripts.security:admin: npm --prefix server test -- --runTestsByPath tests/admin.privilege.security.test.js tests/adminRouteSurfaceSecurity.test.js tests/authMiddleware.admin.test.js --forceExit
scripts.security:business-logic: npm --prefix server test -- --runTestsByPath tests/ecommerce.business-logic.security.test.js tests/orderPricingService.test.js tests/orderControllerCreate.test.js tests/paymentOrderIntegrity.test.js --forceExit
scripts.security:cloudflare: node scripts/security-cloudflare-readiness.mjs && npm --prefix server test -- --runTestsByPath tests/turnstileMiddleware.test.js --forceExit
scripts.security:duo: node scripts/security-duo-readiness.mjs && npm --prefix server test -- --runTestsByPath tests/duoFlags.test.js tests/auth.duo-oidc.security.test.js --forceExit
scripts.test:emergency-controls: npm --prefix server run test:emergency-controls && npm --prefix app test -- EmergencyStatusContext.test.jsx
scripts.security:login-gates: npm run security:deprecated && npm run security:audit && npm run security:prod-hardening-audit && npm run security:prod-env-audit && npm run security:login-next10 && npm run security:attack-smoke && npm run security:auth-tests

extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Aura Marketplace uses the camera for live marketplace and support video calls.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Aura Marketplace uses the microphone for live marketplace and support voice or video calls.
